completed_projects.description: Refactor slides system: split slides-agent into three focused agents (slides-research-agent, pptx-assembly-agent, slidev-assembly-agent) to reduce context window usage and improve consistency. The current slides-agent.md (553 lines) combines format-agnostic research with format-specific assembly, loading all context regardless of workflow. Split research workflow (Stages 0-8) into slides-research-agent, PPTX assembly (Stages A1-A8) into pptx-assembly-agent, and create a new slidev-assembly-agent for Slidev markdown generation. Update skill-slides routing to dispatch to the correct agent based on workflow_type and output_format. Update the /slides command, context index, extensions.json, and CLAUDE.md documentation. Each agent should only load the context it needs, progressively.

Then update docs/general/installation.md to lead with the master script as the installation wizard (explaining to a beginner how to clone the repo and run the script), followed by the existing manual instructions. Similarly, every file in docs/toolchain/ should begin by explaining how to run the corresponding script before the manual installation instructions.

Frozen scripts 01-05 verified unchanged.
